/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tst_ImageListModel.dir/tst_ImageListModel_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_ImageListModel.dir/tst_ImageListModel.cpp.o -o tst_ImageListModel -F/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib ../src/libImageCompareLib.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
